reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau (Meta)
reviews.summary: The patch author posted the same message twice, which is unusual. The content of the messages appears to be identical.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch updates the documentation for vmemmap optimization in hugetlb to reflect changes in how the kernel maps tail pages. The optimization is only applied when the size of struct page is a power of 2, allowing remapping of tail pages and freeing original vmemmap pages.
